top_signals: Iran fires cluster warhead missiles at Tel Aviv — 2 killed Ramat Gan, revenge for Larijani assassination
US drops 5,000-lb bunker busters on hardened Iranian missile sites at Strait of Hormuz
Senate Intel Committee hearing TODAY: Gabbard, CIA Dir Patel, FBI Dir testify on war justification
Putin-Trump phone call TODAY to discuss Ukraine peace — first leader-to-leader contact on Ukraine in weeks
Kabul drug rehab airstrike death toll rises to 408 (BBC/Reuters) — no ceasefire negotiations underway
Gabbard publicly backs Trump's 'imminent threat' determination after NCTC Director Kent resignation
Bahrain intercepts 129 missiles + 221 drones; Gulf states report sustained Iranian bombardment
Ukraine counteroffensive liberates 400+ km² in Zaporizhzhia — Russia's March offensive underperforms
China special envoy mediates Pakistan-Afghanistan — urges ceasefire but no negotiations started
UK Starmer warns against Middle East oil windfall benefiting Russia; Zelensky visits UK today

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 22): ZERO de-escalation signals in active war theaters. Iran escalates with cluster warheads. US escalates with bunker busters. Pakistan kills 408 in Kabul. Israel expands Lebanon ops. Putin-Trump call TODAY is wildcard — Ukraine focus, not ME de-escalation. Senate Intel hearing TODAY — narrative inflection, not battlefield inflection.

latest_news.headline: Senate Intel Committee hearing TODAY — Gabbard, CIA Dir Patel, FBI Dir testify on war justification
latest_news.text: DNI Gabbard publicly backed Trump's 'imminent threat' determination on X after NCTC Director Kent resignation. Senate Intel annual worldwide threats assessment hearing TODAY with Gabbard, CIA Dir Patel, FBI Dir. Top political inflection point for war narrative.

latest_news.headline: Iran confirms death of security chief Ali Larijani — vows retaliation
latest_news.text: Iran's Supreme National Security Council confirms Ali Larijani killed in Israeli strike, along with son and protection team. Iran vows retaliation. Larijani was head of SNSC — de facto leader. Death now officially acknowledged by Tehran.

latest_news.headline: US drops 5,000-lb bunker buster bombs on hardened Iranian missile sites at Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: US dropped multiple 5,000-lb deep penetrator munitions on hardened Iranian missile sites along Hormuz coastline. Part of effort to neutralize Iranian anti-shipping capability. Escalation from previous 2,000-lb bombs.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan airstrike on Kabul drug rehab hospital kills 400+ — AP confirms
latest_news.text: Death toll from Pakistani airstrike on 2,000-bed drug treatment centre in Kabul confirmed at 400+. Pakistan denies hitting civilian sites. Taliban calls it 'crime against humanity.' 4 more killed in border clashes same day. Third week of fighting.

latest_news.headline: CFR analysis: Pakistan declared 'open war' on Afghanistan — ceasefire collapsed
latest_news.text: Pakistan defence minister described situation as 'open war' with Afghanistan. Oct 2025 Qatar-brokered ceasefire fully collapsed. UNAMA records 75+ civilians killed, 193 injured since Feb 26. Fighting is 'most severe between the two neighbors' in years.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 22, 06:04 UTC) — War Day 20. THREE major events TODAY: (1) Senate Intel hearing — Gabbard already backed Trump's 'imminent threat' after Kent resignation; (2) Putin-Trump phone call on Ukraine; (3) Iran vows retaliation for Larijani killing. Iran continues cluster warheads on Israel (2 dead Ramat Gan). US escalates with bunker busters at Hormuz. Pakistan 'open war' on Afghanistan confirmed — 400+ dead Kabul rehab strike. China mediates Pak-Afghan but no ceasefire talks. Oil ~$102. ZERO de-escalation signals in any theater.
